nodes.label: AI as language improver for proposals
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI sometimes to help me improve the language of those proposals

nodes.label: AI as initial draft generator
nodes.grounding_span: I will start by writing my own answers to each of the sections/questions in the application, and then upload to an LLM for a review

nodes.label: AI text formality vs natural voice
nodes.grounding_span: AI generated text tends to be far more formal than what I would write

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI generating safe or conventional ideas
nodes.grounding_span: When I used AI for brainstorming or ideation it often comes up with very 'safe' or conventional ideas

nodes.label: AI as strategic thinking partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I will be able to use AI as a tool to assist me to become more productive

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer the result to sound like me rather than the AI

nodes.label: Effective communication in proposals
nodes.grounding_span: make sure I have covered the key points in my answers and to give suggestions for improvement

nodes.label: Innovation and creating new knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: It is very easy to come up with ideas that everyone else is doing

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: give me time to think about what is important in my projects

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for wording tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI sometimes to help me improve the language of those proposals so they are more effective

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: AI edits remove my 'voice' from the text

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: it often comes up with very 'safe' or conventional ideas

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will be able to use AI as a tool to assist me to become more productive

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and human touch
nodes.grounding_span: I will start by writing my own answers to each of the sections/questions in the application, and then upload to an LLM for a review

nodes.label: Value-driven boundary setting — limits AI use to preserve personal authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I read it and cannot imagine myself writing like this
